overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval rural village at dusk. The character travels along dirt paths between wooden thatched-roof huts under an overcast sky, passing villagers and animals in an atmospheric fantasy setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village outskirts with open fields

events.description: approaching the first wooden huts of the village
path narrows as entering the village center

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the village, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: tall bare tree trunk standing in the open field ahead
wooden hut with straw thatched roof and smoke rising from chimney
rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the path
dense tree line forming the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through open fields toward a medieval village. A large dead tree stands prominently in the center view while thatched-roof huts appear in the distance. The path is a dirt trail bordered by wooden fences, with the sky overcast and dark.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village path between wooden houses

events.description: encountering a villager chopping wood on the right side of the path
passing a wooden hut with warm light glowing from the window

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating the narrow winding paths between closely packed wooden huts

notable_agents.action: villager chopping wood with an axe near a wooden hut

entered.detail: dark wooden log wall of a village house close to the path
wooden signpost attached to a large tree trunk
wooden cabin with warm orange light shining through the window

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through narrow passages between dark wooden huts in the village interior. The path winds between buildings with thatched roofs. A villager is seen chopping wood on the right, and the camera passes a hut with a warmly lit window. The environment feels enclosed with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with campfire and grazing animals

events.description: geese crossing the dirt path ahead
approaching a campfire illuminating the area with flickering light

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past geese and approaching a campfire area with villagers

notable_agents.action: white geese walking and grazing on the side of the path
villagers gathered around a campfire in the distance

entered.detail: burning campfire with visible flames and villagers gathered around
white domestic geese on the dirt path and grass verge
broken wooden cart abandoned on the side of the path
mountain range visible on the horizon under dark clouds

segments.scene_description: The path opens up to the village outskirts where the environment becomes more spacious. Geralt passes white geese on the path and approaches a campfire where villagers are gathered. The area transitions from dense housing to open fields with distant mountains visible, and a broken wooden cart sits on the roadside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, desolate field into the enclosed heart of a medieval village before emerging back into a spacious rural outskirts. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail past a prominent dead tree and wooden fences under a dark, overcast sky. As he enters the village, the environment tightens into narrow passages between dark wooden huts, passing a villager chopping wood and the warm glow of a lit window. The scene then opens up as the path leads away from the dense housing toward the village edge, where white geese scatter across the road. Finally, the camera passes a broken wooden cart and a gathering of villagers around a campfire, revealing a wide vista of open fields and distant mountains.
